name: Spinach and Chickpeas with Feta
recipeIngredient: 1 pound spinach (about 1 lb frozen chopped spinach, thawed)
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine beans, bean liquid, olive oil, and spinach in a large pot.
2. Cook over low heat until spinach is tender and everything else is quite hot (5-10 minutes).
3. Stir in lemon juice, crumble in feta, and add a generous amount of pepper.
4. Remove from heat and serve hot or at room temperature. Serves 6 (or 4-5).
